name: Discord Moderation Action
description: Structured output for a bot moderation decision: action type, reason, duration, and confidence.
example_prompt: Analyze this message and decide the appropriate moderation action: 'Hey everyone, check out my giveaway at spam-link.net — win $1000 today!'

schema.title: ModerationAction
schema.description: A moderation decision made by the AI moderator

duration_minutes.description: Duration in minutes for mute/ban (null = permanent)

confidence.description: Model confidence score for this decision

notify_user.description: Whether to send a DM to the user explaining the action

escalate_to_human.description: Whether this case should be flagged for human review
